name: Mea
description_short: MEA Credit Union is a small community credit union in Monticello, Illinois, offering savings accounts, money market accounts, and share certificates with NCUA insurance protection up to $250,000.
description_long:
MEA Credit Union is a federally insured credit union headquartered in Monticello, Illinois, serving members in the central Illinois region. The institution operates 2 branch locations and maintains NCUA insurance coverage up to $250,000 per depositor, providing members with federal protection for their deposits. Under the leadership of CEO Clay Dunker and President Nichole Boss, the credit union functions as a member-owned financial cooperative. The organization maintains conservative staffing with 1 part-time employee and 0 full-time employees listed, indicating a lean operational model typical of smaller regional credit unions.

MEA Credit Union offers deposit products including savings accounts, money market accounts, and share certificates (CDs) with varying terms. According to MonitorBankRates data from April 2026, their rates compete within the broader market landscape, with comparable offerings such as 12-month share certificates, 6-month share certificates, 3-month share certificates, and savings products. The credit union does not currently maintain ATM locations, requiring members to conduct in-person transactions at their branch offices or use external ATM networks. The institution also offers mortgage products, with 30-year fixed-rate mortgages available to qualified borrowers.

MEA Credit Union distinguishes itself through exceptional financial stability ratings. MonitorBankRates assigns the institution a perfect 5.0 out of 5 star rating and an A+ Overall Health Grade with a score of 100/100. These ratings are based on comprehensive financial data published quarterly by the NCUA and reflect the credit union's strong capitalization and asset quality. The institution's consistent financial performance and member-focused cooperative structure position it as a reliable option for savers seeking safety and stability over high-yield products.

As a smaller regional credit union, MEA's primary limitation is the lack of ATM accessibility and limited branch network, which may inconvenience members seeking 24/7 cash access or multi-location convenience. Current rate data for specific products was not available at the time of the website review, requiring prospective members to contact the institution directly for current offerings. The credit union appears best suited for local members in the Monticello area prioritizing financial safety and personalized service over premium rates or extensive digital banking features. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Savings accounts with NCUA insurance protection
Share certificates (CDs) with multiple term options (3-month, 6-month, 12-month)
Member deposit accounts with federal insurance up to $250,000
In-person banking services at 2 branch locations
Credit union membership and member-owned cooperative benefits
Share certificate rate products for savings goals
pros: Perfect 5.0 out of 5 star rating from MonitorBankRates based on NCUA financial data
Exceptional A+ Overall Health Grade with 100/100 stability score
NCUA insurance protection up to $250,000 per depositor
Member-owned cooperative structure aligned with member interests
Offers multiple deposit products including savings, money market, and share certificates
Mortgage lending available for qualified borrowers
Conservative financial management with strong capitalization
cons: Zero ATM locations, limiting cash access and convenience for members
Only 2 branch locations, restricting accessibility for non-local members
Minimal staffing (1 part-time employee, 0 full-time employees) may limit service hours and responsiveness
Current rate data not available on MonitorBankRates, requiring direct contact for product terms
No digital banking information provided, unclear whether online or mobile banking services are offered
best_for: Local Monticello, Illinois residents prioritizing financial safety and stability
Conservative savers seeking NCUA-insured deposit products with exceptional financial backing
Community-oriented members who value membership in a cooperative financial institution
Borrowers seeking mortgage products from a financially stable local lender
diagnosis: MEA Credit Union is best for local Illinois residents seeking exceptionally safe, NCUA-insured deposit and mortgage products from a financially stable cooperative institution. The primary caveat is limited accessibility—no ATM network and only 2 branches make it impractical for non-local or convenience-focused members, and current rates require direct contact rather than online comparison.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
